evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); const price=document.querySelector('.cat-price[data-cat-precio]'); r.precioExiste=!!price; r.tieneOnclick=price?price.getAttribute('onclick'):null; r.pointerEvents=price?getComputedStyle(price).pointerEvents:null; r.antesModal=!!document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); if(price){price.click();} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); r.despuesModal=!!document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); return r; })()
